overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city street at night, entering a neon-lit retro diner with red booths and arcade aesthetics. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing detailed interior lighting and atmosphere as the camera moves from the wet sidewalk into the warmly lit restaurant interior.

segments.scene_description: Walking toward the back of the diner past pink booth seating and prominent neon wall art including a 'SUNSET' sign and colorful figure outlines. A patron sits in a booth on the right as the camera approaches the rear of the establishment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cold, rain-slicked cyberpunk street into the warm, neon-saturated interior of a retro diner. It begins by gliding along a wet sidewalk under a dark sky, moving toward the glowing windows of a roadside establishment. As the camera passes through the doorway, the city street falls away and the environment shifts into a cozy space featuring a red bar counter and an arcade machine. The scene then expands deeper into the diner, passing a bartender and red bar stools illuminated by wall-mounted screens and flickering neon signs. Finally, the camera progresses toward the rear of the establishment, moving past pink booth seating and a patron toward vibrant wall art and a glowing SUNSET sign.
